title: Create AboveTech
description: A perfect modpack based on the create mod and adding many different generator and nature improvements
body:
# **Create AboveTech Modpack**

![modpack title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a8ecda9bef676404ebae1bac6a01604efaf90bc.png)
### An amazing modpack that has a ton of mods that improve your gameplay
#

🛠️ **Create, Nature and Performance Together**

Dive into a creative world built around the powerful Create mod, enhanced with lush, expanded nature and improved world generation. Carefully selected performance mods ensure smooth gameplay even on lower-end systems—without compromising the quality of your experience.

⚡ **Performance**

Modpack includes carefully selected optimization mods, tested for compatibility. Unnecessary, system-intensive mods have been removed so that they don't interfere with other improvements. The whole thing has been optimized for stability and smooth gameplay.

Recommendation: Allocate at least 4GB of RAM for optimal performance.
#

<details>
  <summary>💡 Modpack Requirements</summary>

  - Minimum RAM: 4GB allocated  
  - Recommended RAM: 5GB+  
  - Java 17 required  
  - Forge 47.4.0 - 1.20.1

</details>

**List of included mods:**

<details>
  <summary>📋 List of included mods</summary>

**🔧 Additional mods to be installed manually**
- [Farmers Structures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-structures/files/5665877) for more structures in the world.
- [Acedium](https://github.com/ferriarnus/acedium/releases/tag/v0.2.7-1.20.1) only if you have a graphics card from the NVIDIA GTX 1600 series or newer.
- [Happy Ghast Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/happy-ghast-backported/files/6452141) HHappy Ghast Backport from 1.21.6
